phonetic: da瑟藞d蕭est蓹bl; d瑟藞d蕭est蓹bl
examples: But the food itself was barely digestible, and many team members suffered from diarrhoea or constipation.
They come upon a clump or something, and they sort a circle of it to see whether it's more digestible.
We set a 10-year time horizon so the cost can be digestible and affordable.
And, also unlike conventional plastics, they are eminently digestible (at least to micro-organisms) after use.
